news.headline: ‘Not easy’: Japan mulls building its own LNG carriers amid Iran energy crisis
news.summary:
As the US-Israel war on Iran strains global energy supplies, Japan is discussing reviving domestic production of liquefied natural gas carriers for the first time in more than half a decade to bolster its national security.

news.headline: FIFA’s Gianni Infantino seemingly changes course on peace efforts
news.summary: FIFA President Gianni Infantino said his organisation “can certainly not solve geopolitical conflicts.”

news.headline: Iran footballer Azmoun kicked off national team for disloyalty, say reports
news.summary: Reports say Sardar Azmoun, who plays for UAE club Shabab Al-Ahli, was expelled for Instagram post with Dubai's ‌ruler.
